economic_notes: First Nation has 14.28% investment in PHC Holdings Ltd. and PHC Holdings Limited Partnership. Keeseekoose Haylands Trust assets of $21,676,162 held under administration but not on balance sheet. 1909 Surrender Claim ongoing with loan of $2,446,575 to finance negotiation costs.
notes: DISCLAIMER OF OPINION issued by auditor - unable to obtain sufficient appropriate audit evidence for significant number of transactions. Audit_qualified set to true. Financial statements are for March 31, 2021 but signed March 2024 (approximately 3 years late). BMO demand loan of $3,584,298 is in arrears with no payments made. RBC 1909 Surrender Claim loan totalling $2,446,575. CMHC reserves underfunded by $811,915. Subsidiaries consolidated: KK Development Inc., KKTLE Holdings Corp., Keeseekoose Land Holding Corporation. Deferred revenue lines include unexpended funds treatment which inflates gross revenue figures. current_liabilities includes accounts payable $1,467,788 + deferred revenue ISC $4,828,078 + deferred revenue other $58,734 + current LTD $6,030,873 + current CMHC $174,636 = $12,560,109; long_term_debt shown is CMHC non-current portion only $1,992,262.
